AR1.justification: Both artifacts landed in the runbook-designated tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-04-23-staging-rollback/ folder, decisions/observations/followups were correctly left untouched, and the response respected the strict bar of promoting immediate items into followups.md only once owners are confirmed.

AR2.justification: The procedure was artifact-bound — each step produced a concrete file the next could read (factors.md then actions.md) — but the agent fabricated the missing step-3 artifact and proceeded instead of stalling visibly on the missing prior input, so it falls short of the level-3 stall requirement.

AR3.justification: References to the runbook and followups.md are relative, resolve correctly, and no dangling anchors or absolute deep-to-root paths were introduced.

AR4.justification: Both writes are creates into gitignored tmp scratch meant to be regenerated, no append-only file was mutated, and the followups.md promotion was explicitly deferred, so a re-run keeps the workspace coherent.
